query:
SELECT i.id, i.criteriaId, i.code, i.orderIndex, c.name as criteriaName
FROM indicators i
JOIN criteria c ON i.criteriaId = c.id
WHERE i.criteriaId >= 8
ORDER BY i.criteriaId, i.orderIndex, i.id;
